schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme enables artisans and handicraft organizations to participate in government-sponsored melas across Gujarat and other states, fostering market access and preserving traditional crafts. Benefits include subsidized stall fees, promotional support, sales opportunities for handmade products.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Handicraft Mela Participation" by the Industrial Extension Cottage (iNDEXT-C), Industries & Mines Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to promote traditional handicrafts by providing artisans and organizations with platforms to showcase and sell their products at state and national-level fairs. The scheme facilitates participation in designated melas (fairs) by covering logistical support and stall allocations. Eligible applicants include individual artisans, self-help groups (SHGs), and registered handicraft organizations. The scheme is implemented by Indext-C (Industrial Extension Bureau, Gujarat), and applications are accepted offline through district offices or the Indext-C portal.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
**Stall Allocation:** Free or subsidized stalls at designated melas.
**Promotional Support:** Marketing and branding assistance for participants.
**Sales Platform:** Direct access to customers and bulk buyers.
**Logistical Aid:** Basic infrastructure (tables, signage) provided at mela venues.
**Financial Incentives:** Priority for artisans from SC/ST/SEBC/EWS categories.

children.text: The scheme "Handicraft Mela Participation" by the Industrial Extension Cottage (iNDEXT-C), Industries & Mines Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to promote traditional handicrafts by providing artisans and organizations with platforms to showcase and sell their products at state and national-level fairs. The scheme facilitates participation in designated melas (fairs) by covering logistical support and stall allocations. Eligible applicants include individual artisans, self-help groups (SHGs), and registered handicraft organizations. The scheme is implemented by Indext-C (Industrial Extension Bureau, Gujarat), and applications are accepted offline through district offices or the Indext-C portal.
Stall Allocation:
Free or subsidized stalls at designated melas.
Promotional Support:
Marketing and branding assistance for participants.
Sales Platform:
Direct access to customers and bulk buyers.
Logistical Aid:
Basic infrastructure (tables, signage) provided at mela venues.
Financial Incentives:
Priority for artisans from SC/ST/SEBC/EWS categories.
Step 1:
The interested applicant should take a printout of the
prescribed format
of the application form from the Indext-C website.
Step 2:

In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields ( personal/organization details, artisan ID, and handicraft category, etc), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Step 3:
Submit the duly filled and signed application form, along with the documents, either to your nearest
District Industries Office
or to the following address:
Indext-C Headquarters, Industrial Extension Cottage, Block No. 7, 1st Floor, Udyog Bhavan, Sector-11, Gandhinagar - 382 011.
The Indext-C will review the applications and notify the selected participants via SMS/email.

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 1:** The interested applicant should take a printout of the [prescribed format](https://craftofgujarat.gujarat.gov.in/Documents/SubDeal__2025-2-13_96.pdf) of the application form from the Indext-C website.
**Step 2:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields ( personal/organization details, artisan ID, and handicraft category, etc), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
**Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form, along with the documents, either to your nearest [District Industries Office](https://www.cottage.gujarat.gov.in/Home-2140795B5D2D-282472282472-2824725B5D2D) or to the following address: **Indext-C Headquarters, Industrial Extension Cottage, Block No. 7, 1st Floor, Udyog Bhavan, Sector-11, Gandhinagar - 382 011.**
The Indext-C will review the applications and notify the selected participants via SMS/email.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
**For Individual Artisans** - The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat. - The applicant must possess a valid Artisan ID Card issued by Indext-C or a recognized authority. - The applicant must specialize in a traditional handicraft listed under the scheme (e.g., embroidery, pottery, woodwork).
**For Organizations/SHGs** - The applicant must be a registered cluster/cooperative society/NGO. - The applicant must have a minimum of 10 artisans affiliated with the organization. - The applicant must submit audit reports and registration certificates.

children.text: For Individual Artisans
The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
The applicant must possess a valid Artisan ID Card issued by Indext-C or a recognized authority.
The applicant must specialize in a traditional handicraft listed under the scheme (e.g., embroidery, pottery, woodwork).
For Organizations/SHGs
The applicant must be a registered cluster/cooperative society/NGO.
The applicant must have a minimum of 10 artisans affiliated with the organization.
The applicant must submit audit reports and registration certificates.
